text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey,<n>hey, hey,
Taaaiiishhhiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up... I can't hear the sound.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Taishin. It appears Ticket is overflowing<n>with
energy. What will you do?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ignore her. This game's just getting<n>good.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I know, I know, I knooow! I have a game<n>we can
all play!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh? And what would that be?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's called the Tickezo game! First I shout<n>
something REALLY LOUD, and then—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Awwwww! At least let me finish!
